content.en:
Blood Wolf Pavilion.

Ye Tian walked into this store, and as soon as he entered this store, he met a supreme powerhouse clerk, and he was also a supreme shopkeeper of the flesh body tribulation realm, and he probably had the cultivation of the flesh body three tribulation realm.

In the Tianlin Realm, only the invincible have a certain status, and the strongest or even the strongest in the flesh robbery realm have no status, and it is very normal to be a clerk.

The Blood Wolf Pavilion not only sells all kinds of treasures, but also buys all kinds of treasures.

In the center of the Blood Wolf Pavilion was a huge screen displaying various treasures and prices.

Nine-leaf blood qi grass, 1000 origin rules robbery crystals.

Yang Yunshi, 8000 Origin Rule Robbery Crystal.

Rob the stone, 100 origin rules rob the crystal.

One catastrophe and blood, 80,000 origin rules robbery crystals.

Ten Tribulations of Blood, 200,000 Origin Rules of Robbery Crystals.

Hundred Tribulation Blood, 3 million Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals.

Thousands of tribulations of blood, 50 million origin rules of robbery crystals.

......

"The value of blood robbery is so high!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

If he became stronger in the future, he could easily slaughter the Thousand Tribulation Tribulation Beasts, wouldn't he be able to easily obtain countless Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals.

But when he thought that he was so strong, maybe 100 million Origin Rule Robbery Crystals was nothing to him.

According to the value of the robbery bones, the robbery bones of the thirty-seven tribulations are worth about 300,000 pieces, which is cheaper than the value of the robbery blood, because the robbery blood of the thirty-seven tribulations is about 800,000 origin rule robbery crystals.

Of course, if Ye Tian was to sell the robbery bones, he would definitely not have such a high price, after all, the Blood Wolf Pavilion also had to make money.

Ye Tian did not sell the thirty-seven tribulation bones, but sold those twenty-eight tribulation bones.

He didn't sell all the robbing bones, he only sold three robbery bones, and each robbery bone was sold for 180,000 pieces, and he obtained a total of 540,000 origin rule robbery crystals.

This suddenly made the number of Origin Rule Tribulation Crystals on Ye Tian's body skyrocket, and it was a catastrophe.

"It seems that hunting beasts is still making money by robbing blood and bones, and the origin rules of robbing beasts are the lowest value!" Ye Tian said darkly.

There are a lot of treasures in the Blood Wolf Pavilion, and there are even many treasures that are helpful to the ancestor and the strongest ancestor, and there is also a treasure called the emperor's blood, this kind of treasure is a supreme treasure for the kind of ancestor who is not promoted by the founding ancestor method, it can make the physical foundation stronger, and it can also remove the barrier between the body and the ancestor method, and increase the fit.

In this way, those Ancestors would be comparable to the Ancestors of the Self-Founding Ancestor Method, and there would be hope for them to be promoted to a higher realm in the future.

Ye Tian's wife and children were all ancestors who had been promoted through the fusion of his ancestor method, so they were affected, but if it was after refining the emperor's blood, this influence would not exist.

Of course, the value of the Emperor's blood is also extremely precious, worth 2 million Origin Rule Robbery Crystals.

Ye Tian needed four pieces of Emperor Blood, and he had to pay a total of 8 million Origin Rule Robbery Crystals.

Ye Tian can't afford it now, even if he sells all the robbing bones on his body, he can't afford it.

Therefore, Ye Tian was going to buy the Emperor's Blood Spirit next time he came to the Tianlin Realm.

......

For the next period of time, Ye Tian had been learning about the situation in the Absolute Martial City, not only knowing the usefulness of many treasures, and his knowledge had greatly increased, but also knowing a secret, that is, once the Supreme of the Eternal Heaven and Earth left the Eternal Heaven and Earth and entered the Exotic World, his strength would be suppressed very much.

Because of this, it is extremely difficult for the Supreme of the Eternal Heaven and Earth to enter the foreign world to hunt the robber beasts, even if they are incomparably powerful, if they run to hunt the robber beasts when their strength is infinitely suppressed, they are very likely to fall and die.

Because of this, there are very few supreme beings in the eternal world to hunt robber beasts, only the powerful supreme who has risen from the exotic world dare to hunt robber beasts, but it also needs to be investigated clearly, and even use some weak people as bait, after understanding the strength of the robber beasts, they dare to hunt.

But more than ninety-nine percent of the supreme beings came from the eternal heaven and earth, so it was too rare for the supreme beings to hunt and kill the beasts.

It is precisely because of this that the value of blood and bones is so high.

Other than that.

There are too many robber beasts that have been killed, and they will carry the resentful aura of robber beasts on their bodies, and once this aura accumulates to a certain extent, it will attract the attention of some terrifying robber beasts.

Tribulation beasts above 100,000 Tribulation Yuan are able to leave the exotic world and enter other exotic worlds, once they are noticed by such a calamity beast, even if they are first-class invincible, they have the possibility of falling.

So.

Many invincible people, even if they are strong, do not dare to hunt robbers in large quantities, and there are only some invincible people who are proficient in the ability of the doppelganger, relying on the doppelganger to hunt the beast, and the resentment on the doppelganger will not be transmitted to the body, but the cost of abandoning the doppelganger again and again is too great, and those invincible people who are proficient in the ability of the doppelganger will not hunt the beast often, once the number of clones is more, it will also be very lossful.

However, Ye Tian didn't need to worry about this problem.

Right now, what Ye Tian wanted most was to join a powerful force, and after some understanding, he knew that the eight great eternal name-level forces would hardly recruit outsiders and invincibles.

Because six of the eight eternal name-level forces belong to racial forces, similar to the Terrans, will the Terrans recruit strong people from outside the Terrans?

Although the other two eternal name-level forces recruit outsiders invincible, their requirements are extremely high, and they attach great importance to loyalty, and they need to make an extremely harsh eternal oath that they will never leave the eternal name-level forces, and they do not value the general invincible, and only recruit strong people above the fifth rank invincible.

Therefore, none of these eight Eternal Name-level forces were suitable for Ye Tian.

So, Ye Tian retreated and chose a saint-level force.

Some of the Saint-level forces are also extremely powerful, except that there is no Supreme, but at the level of the Invincible, they are not necessarily weaker than the Eternal Name-level forces.

And after investigation and screening again and again, Ye Tian felt that there was a saint-level force, and he had the hope of joining.

This holy name-level force is the Tianfeng Sea, this saint-level force is very powerful, and it is also extremely ancient, although there is no supreme, but it has many first-class invincible people, and its reputation is very loud in the Tianlin Realm.

The key is that this force recruits outsiders and has no constraints, so many invincible people want to join the Heavenly Wind Sea.

However, it is not easy to join the Tianfeng Sea, the entry threshold is the sixth-rank invincible, and you must survive the six physical tribulations when you are in the physical body tribulation realm, otherwise you are not qualified to join the Tianfeng Sea.

And most of the invincible people had broken through with the Five Tribulations of the Flesh at the beginning, so they were not qualified to join the Heavenly Wind Sea.

In addition, you need to complete an introductory task of Tianfeng Sea, and only after completing it, you can become a member of Tianfeng Sea.

"Just choose Tianfeng Hai!"

Ye Tian decided.
